final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic explaining the definitions and relationships among seven AI concepts: AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, and CLI.

Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration style, sketch-and-ink with light watercolor washes, reminiscent of sketchnote / visual thinking diagrams by Mike Rohde
Composition: portrait layout, top-to-bottom reading flow, each concept in its own labeled node, connected by annotated arrows showing relationships, generous white space between sections
Subject: seven concept nodes — AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — each with a small hand-drawn icon, a one-line plain-language definition, and relationship arrows to connected concepts
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white paper texture background, no decorative scenery
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting appropriate for a printed diagram, friendly and approachable tone
Color palette: warm off-white base, dark ink lines as primary, three accent colors (sky blue, coral orange, soft green) used consistently to color-code concept categories
Materials/textures: visible pencil sketch lines under ink, subtle paper grain, hand-lettered labels in a casual sans-serif style
Text (verbatim): "AI" / "MCP" / "AI Agent" / "OpenClaw" / "AI Skill" / "蒸馏" / "CLI"
Constraints: all seven concept labels must appear verbatim and legibly; relationship arrows must be annotated with brief connector phrases (e.g. "uses", "runs on", "enables"); diagram must be readable at A4 print size
Avoid: corporate flat-design clipart, 3D effects, photorealistic rendering, gradient mesh backgrounds, overcrowded layout, decorative borders unrelated to content
